name: Puffed Wheat Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cereal in a large bowl and set aside.
2. In a heavy saucepan, bring brown sugar and corn syrup to a boil.
3. Add butter to the boiling mixture.
4. Combine evaporated milk and sugar; add this mixture to the boiling mixture.
5. Continue cooking until the mixture forms a soft ball when liquid is dropped into cold water (240°F on a candy thermometer).
6. Pour the cooled mixture over the cereal and stir to coat.
7. Shape the mixture into 2-inch balls.
Grandma Hunt, Panguitch, Utah Taste of Home Dec/Jan/94
